title: BUA Cement Profit After Tax Surges By 640.4% - FinancialEDGE
description: BUA Cement Plc released its unaudited third quarter financial results for the period ended September 30th, 2025, showcasing impressive growth driven by strong revenue expansion and significant margin accretion. The company's profit after tax jumped 640.4% year-on-year to N108.96 billion, with earnings per share (EPS) growing 491.9% year-on-year to N8.56. Key highlights of the result
html:
BUA Cement Plc released its unaudited third quarter financial results for the period ended September 30th, 2025, showcasing impressive growth driven by strong revenue expansion and significant margin accretion.

The company’s profit after tax jumped 640.4% year-on-year to N108.96 billion, with earnings per share (EPS) growing 491.9% year-on-year to N8.56.

Key highlights of the result shows that revenue expanded by 26.9% year-on-year, supported by both price and volume increases. Profit before tax growing 472.3% year-on-year to N123.77 billion [1][2][3].

Gross margin expanded 18.76 percentage points year-on-year to 54.6%, driven by a 10.2% year-on-year reduction in cost of sales excluding depreciation.
